tagline: Your Experts in Pools and Water Features

hero.headline:
30 Years Perfecting Coachella Valley
Pools
hero.subheadline: From custom pool construction to weekly maintenance, Ocean Springs Tech has been the Coachella Valley's trusted pool experts since 1996. Founded by Armando Rodriguez with resort-level expertise, we handle everything so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Water Feature<br class="hidden md:block"> Solutions Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From dream-pool construction to weekly chemical balancing, Ocean Springs Tech is your one-stop solution for every backyard water feature need in the Coachella Valley.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom-designed swimming pools built for your lifestyle and property. Residential and commercial projects with resort-quality craftsmanship from concept to completion.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into an aging pool with replastering, retiling, and full modernization. We transform tired pools into stunning backyard centerpieces.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Chemical balancing, skimming, vacuuming, and filter cleaning to keep your pool swim-ready year-round. Reliable service you can count on every week.

cards.title: Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing, and automation systems diagnosed and repaired by our experienced technicians. Fast turnaround on most repairs.

cards.title: Water Features & Fountains
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, fountains, spillways, and decorative water features designed and built to transform any outdoor space into an oasis.

cards.title: Decks, Pavers & Tile
cards.description: Concrete deck installation, cool deck coatings, paver upgrades, and professional pool tile work to complete your backyard transformation.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool Project in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule a Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool needs. Whether it's a new build, remodel, or maintenance, we'll visit your property and provide an honest, detailed estimate within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Design & Execute
steps.description: Our licensed, insured team handles everything from permits to final inspection. With 30 years of experience and resort-level standards, every detail is covered.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Oasis
steps.description: Your pool, spa, or water feature is delivered exactly as promised. We stay on for ongoing maintenance so it stays pristine season after season.

about.label: Why Coachella Valley Trusts Us
about.headline: Resort-Level Pool Expertise — Right in Your Backyard
about.description: Founded in 1996 by Armando Rodriguez, Ocean Springs Tech was born from hands-on experience at a premier Coachella Valley resort. Over three decades, we've grown into the valley's go-to team for pool construction, remodeling, maintenance, and water features. With an A+ BBB rating and a BuildZoom score placing us in the top 8% of California contractors, we bring commercial-grade expertise to every residential and commercial project we touch.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Insured
features.description: Dual California contractor licenses covering pool construction, concrete services, and maintenance. Bonded and workers' comp insured for your protection.

features.title: Top 8% in California
features.description: Our BuildZoom score of 105 ranks us among the elite contractors in the state. That's earned through decades of quality work, not marketing.

features.title: One-Stop Pool Solutions
features.description: Design, build, maintain, and repair — all under one roof. No juggling multiple contractors. We handle your entire backyard water feature journey.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets an honest, detailed estimate upfront. We tailor solutions to your budget and never hit you with hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our Coachella Valley Quality Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. With 30 years of reputation on the line, we stand behind every pool we build, every remodel we complete, and every maintenance visit we make. Your satisfaction is our business.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on the design complexity and permits. We keep you informed at every stage and handle all permitting so you don't have to worry about a thing.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve homeowners, HOAs, hotels, resorts, spas, and fitness centers across the Greater Coachella Valley. Commercial clients get dedicated scheduling and priority response.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Greater Coachella Valley including Desert Hot Springs, Palm Springs, Palm Desert, Cathedral City, Indian Wells, Indio, La Quinta, Rancho Mirage, Bermuda Dunes, Thousand Palms, and City of Banning.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold dual California contractor licenses (#1053509 and #920435) covering pool construction, concrete services, and maintenance. We're bonded through Old Republic Surety and carry full workers' compensation insurance.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to pool issues?
faqs.answer: We maintain a 100% response rate with an average 4-hour response time. For emergencies, we prioritize same-day or next-day service. Call us and we'll get someone out to you fast.

testimonials.name: Jeffrey W.
testimonials.text: Ocean Springs Tech did a fantastic job renovating my pool and spa waterfall, and decking. The team was professional from start to finish and the results exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Lisa M.
testimonials.text: Armando and his entire crew did a fabulous rehab of our pool, spa and pool deck after 25 years of deterioration. They brought everything back to life beautifully.

testimonials.name: Gionni V.
testimonials.text: Quality work from office staff to field workers. Outstanding pool replastering results. Ocean Springs Tech is the real deal — professional, reliable, and top-notch craftsmanship.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from the Coachella Valley's most trusted pool experts. 30 years of experience, A+ BBB rated, and a 4-hour average response time.
